Other tenants upgrade with HFC03 on 2026-08-01/02
D/P tenants upgrade with HFC03+ on 2026-08-15/16
Standard maintenance, online software change, optional maintenance pattern after 2608

sources.title: What's New in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602.4 (HFC12)
sources.checksumMethod: Canonical rows sorted by SAP Help URL: loio|date|versionId|title|url
trackedSignals: SAP Help exposes 54 official What's New entries for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602.4 (HFC12), all dated 2026-06-26 in search results

Relevant visible topics include Schedule Goods Issue for Deliveries Using Developer Extensibility, Explore Migration Objects App - Enhancements, Features for Joule, Print Preview on Explode BOM, Electronic Invoicing via Approved Platform, and finance/compliance/logistics updates
This is tracked as the product-assistance layer for the current 2602 maintenance cycle; SAP Note 3646210 remains the HFC13 correction source

sources.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602.4: Final What's New & Product Assistance available
sources.checksumMethod: Cleaned visible text after removing scripts, styles, tags, and normalized whitespace
trackedSignals: SAP announced final What's New information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602.4
SAP announced final Product Assistance for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602.4
SAP recommends the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency tool for a personalized view based on activated and used scope
The announcement says 2602.4 information would be available in RASD within the next few days

sources.title: Preliminary What's New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2608
trackedSignals: Preliminary 2608 What's New information is available
Preliminary 2608 Product Assistance is available
Use What's New Viewer or RASD for upgrade preparation
RASD provides a personalized view based on activated and used scope
Valid S-user access is required for RASD and all preliminary content

sources.title: Release Assessment and Scope Dependency for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: What is new in 2026
trackedSignals: RASD 2026 guidance focuses on disruption-free upgrades and zero Day 1 impact based on customer usage
What's New Viewer change history tracks content updates from preliminary release content through RTC
Last Modified On filtering helps review only recently changed What's New entries
RASD impact cards now support navigation to Custom CDS Views, Manage Business Role Changes After Upgrade, and tenant-specific S/4HANA Cloud apps
Impacted areas include extensibility objects, where-used lists, impacted business catalogs, IAM apps, and renamed app tiles

sources.title: Register now for the 2608 Early Release Series!
trackedSignals: 2608 Early Release Series runs 2026-07-13 to 2026-07-17
Sessions include Artificial Intelligence, Extensibility, Finance, SAP Activate, SAP Cloud ALM, Test Automation Tool, Sales, Asset Management, GRC, Sourcing and Procurement, and related topics
Active SAP Learning Hub account is required for sign-up
Static source text does not expose a reliable session timezone

sources.title: Why It's Important to Activate New Apps and How to Do It (Short Version)
trackedSignals: From SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2602, new IAM apps are delivered inactive by default
Customers should identify successor apps, affected business roles, and required IAM app activation
SAP references SAP Note 2975653 as the central IAM change overview
Customer follow-up includes testing, role restrictions, catalog/page impacts, transport, documentation, filter migration, and end-user communication

sources.title: 2608 IAM successor app checklist
trackedSignals: 2608 pre-upgrade customer action: check and activate successor IAM apps if predecessor apps are used
Successor IAM app IDs called out include F3516A_TRAN, F3425A_TRAN, F1443B_TRAN, F3883A_TRAN, F3915A_TRAN, F7280A_TRAN, F0956B_TRAN, and F9104_TRAN
Use IAM Information System, Display IAM Apps, Manage Business Role Changes After Upgrade, Maintain Business Roles, and Mass Change workflows
Transport validated business-role changes to Test and Production before the relevant 2608 upgrade windows

sources.title: 4-Eyes by Configuration: Multi-Processor Workflow Approvals in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2608
trackedSignals: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2608 introduces multi-processor task completion for two- or three-person approvals
Supports four-eyes and six-eyes workflow approval controls in Manage Workflow
Includes uniqueness rules for independent processing and validation callbacks to block invalid workflow activation
Review affected flexible workflows after 2608 upgrade and test approval, substitution, forwarding, and excluded-agent scenarios

sources.title: SAP BTP ABAP Environment - Pre-Upgrade Option for Release 2608
trackedSignals: Optional SAP BTP ABAP Environment 2608 pre-upgrade testing can be nominated for existing systems
Nominated systems are planned for pre-upgrade on 2026-07-17 from 08:00 to 16:00 CET, or 2026-07-17 17:00 to 2026-07-18 01:00 AEST if SAP's CET label is interpreted literally
SAP recommends non-development systems such as test systems; production nomination is not meaningful
Pre-upgrade is planned with HFC02, followed by HFC03 during the test phase; standard upgrade is planned for 2026-08-15/16 with HFC04

sources.title: What's New in the Explore Migration Objects App: Releases 2602.4 and 2608
trackedSignals: Explore Migration Objects app adds release 2602.4 and 2608 features for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
New migration-object Availability column and quick filter indicate which migration objects are available for activated scope
New scope-item Status column and enhanced dependency graph improve migration planning visibility
Availability can depend on activated scope, feature toggles, and business function activation

sources.title: SAP Preferred Success: Join Our SAP Cloud ERP 2608 Release Planning Session!
trackedSignals: APJ English live session is listed for 2026-07-08 from 13:00 to 14:00 AEST
Session covers 2608 release dates, upgrade process, and new system maintenance schedule starting from September
Session includes RASD impact analysis and 2602/2608 call-to-action items
SAP says registration is via SAP Learning Hub and the audience is SAP Cloud ERP with SAP Preferred Success subscription customers

sources.title: Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: From reactive maintenance to autonomous agents
trackedSignals: SAP describes AI-assisted Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
Maintenance supervisor scenario: group, deduplicate, and prioritize notifications
Maintenance planner scenario: synthesize fragmented asset data and recommend planning decisions
Maintenance technician scenario: photo-assisted defect reporting and AI-created maintenance notifications

sources.title: Decentralized Extended Warehouse Management and Quality Management in Two-Tier ERP
sources.checksumMethod: Cleaned visible text after removing scripts, styles, tags, and normalized whitespace
trackedSignals: SAP describes decentralized SAP EWM integration with SAP Cloud ERP in a two-tier ERP scenario
Quality inspection is executed directly in EWM using the Quality Inspection Engine
Inbound delivery starts in SAP Cloud ERP, is distributed to decentralized EWM, and warehouse-side inspection outcomes update stock status back to SAP Cloud ERP
Relevant review areas include QIE inspection rules, inspection object types, follow-up actions, stock-type mapping, and inbound delivery distribution

sources.title: Recommendations for Wrapper Interface Design
sources.checksumMethod: Cleaned visible text after removing scripts, styles, tags, and normalized whitespace
trackedSignals: SAP clean-core extensibility guidance for SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Wrapper interfaces are recommended to encapsulate classic APIs and internal objects
Wrappers define stable contracts, reduce dependencies on underlying implementations, and improve testability
Relevant for custom ABAP Cloud extension readiness before 2608 regression testing

sources.title: Outbound delivery stock-shortage warning by custom logic
sources.checksumMethod: RSS description text because direct SAP Community article returned 503 during this check
trackedSignals: SAP S/4HANA Cloud custom logic example for outbound delivery creation
BAdI LE_SHP_DELIVERY_FINAL_CHECK is used for final checks before delivery save
Scenario compares sales-order item quantity with current stock and raises a warning when stock is insufficient
API-created outbound delivery behavior is called out as a separate message-handling consideration
sources.lastCheckStatus: Direct article retry returned 503 at 2026-06-29T16:02:33+10:00; RSS description retained.

sources.title: API-created delivery stock-shortage handling
sources.checksumMethod: Cleaned visible article text and RSS description text
trackedSignals: SAP S/4HANA Cloud API-created outbound delivery stock-shortage scenario
API creation can create the outbound delivery with available stock and leave external systems inconsistent if insufficient stock is only warned
Method 1 uses BAdI LE_SHP_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE to set delivery custom field YY1_Message
Method 2 uses BAdI LE_SHP_DELIVERY_FINAL_CHECK; SAP notes API-created delivery scenarios can ignore warnings, so error handling may be required

sources.title: Navigating the 5-Country Strategy with SAP Central Business Configuration to Speed Up Implementation
sources.checksumMethod: Cleaned visible text after removing scripts, styles, tags, and normalized whitespace
trackedSignals: SAP Central Business Configuration guidance for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
CBC scope extension, including country additions, cannot create a country delta greater than five countries
Large rollouts should be phased into requests of five or fewer country additions
The five-country delta also affects main-line and parallel-line merge or rebase scenarios when country scope diverges

sources.title: SAP EPPM Financial Planning: Introducing Custom Value Types for Flexible Cost Splits
sources.checksumMethod: Cleaned visible text after removing scripts, styles, tags, and normalized whitespace
trackedSignals: SAP EPPM financial-planning guidance for custom value types and flexible cost splits
Scenario separates CAPEX and OPEX cost categories beyond standard aggregation dimensions
Implementation includes integration customizing and BAdI RPM_FICO_INT
SAP says split-instance landscapes require custom value type configuration on both EPPM and Project System sides

sources.title: Origin Profit Centers - Track Margins not only for Responsible but also for Contributing Profit Ctrs
sources.checksumMethod: Cleaned visible text after removing scripts, styles, tags, and normalized whitespace
trackedSignals: SAP S/4HANA Cloud introduces Origin Profit Center as a Universal Journal attribute
Attribute identifies the employee home profit center derived from assigned cost center
Supports project-margin reporting by both responsible and contributing profit centers
Relevant for professional-services CPM projects and cross-project-ownership reporting

sources.title: Advanced Down Payment Processing Meets Milestone Billing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
trackedSignals: SAP describes Advanced Down Payment Processing combined with milestone billing
New process: Milestone Billing with Down Payment Requests
SAP references scope item 7Z1 for Sales Order Processing with Milestone Billing
Relevant review area: sales billing, customer down payments, settlement invoices, and order-related billing

sources.title: Project Billing: Clarified Billing Relevance for Revenue and Sales Deduction G/L Accounts
trackedSignals: With SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2608, Project Billing applies a standardized billing-relevance check for project-related journal entries
Journal entries posted to G/L accounts with Cost Element Category 11 (Revenues) or 12 (Sales Deduction) are excluded from Project Billing processes
The check applies across Manage Project Billing and Project Billing APIs
In 2602.3 the behavior is available through feature toggle PROJ_BILLG_ACCOUNT_TYPE_CHECK; in 2608 SAP says the toggle is delivered enabled by default for transition

sources.title: Workflow-Based Treasury Business Partner Controls Across the Treasury Lifecycle
trackedSignals: SAP describes innovation planned with SAP Cloud ERP release 2608 for workflow-based Treasury Business Partner controls
Focus areas include regulatory/audit requirements, payment controls, segregation of duties, approval traceability, and protection of sensitive Business Partner data
Sensitive Treasury Business Partner changes include counterparty data, bank details, standing instructions, and other payment-relevant information
Relevant downstream processes include external confirmations, settlements, payment initiation, and correspondence

sources.title: Dynamic Fiscal Period Determination in EBRR period-end close run application jobs
sources.checksumMethod: Cleaned visible text after removing scripts, styles, tags, and normalized whitespace
trackedSignals: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2608 introduces dynamic determination of To Fiscal Period/Year for EBRR period-end close jobs
The feature supports Current Fiscal Period and Previous Fiscal Period options instead of only static fiscal-period values
Runtime determination evaluates company code, ledger, fiscal-year variant, and job run date
SAP says the supported jobs include Run Revenue Recognition for Sales Orders, Projects, Service Documents, Provider Contracts, and Revenue Contracts

sources.title: Enterprise Resource Planning Blog Posts by SAP articles
trackedSignals: RSS feed is now used as a discovery source for SAP ERP product and extensibility posts that keyword search can miss

Feed scan found additional SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition / SAP Cloud ERP product signals for sales extensibility, clean-core wrapper guidance, outbound delivery custom logic, API-created delivery stock-shortage handling, EPPM planning, Origin Profit Centers, CBC 5-country rollout planning, EBRR scheduling, EWM/QM two-tier integration, and Joule/two-tier planning

Already tracked feed items include Asset Management autonomous agents, EWM/QM two-tier warehouse integration, clean-core wrapper design, outbound-delivery stock warning custom logic, API-created delivery stock-shortage handling, EPPM custom value types, Origin Profit Centers, CBC 5-country rollout planning, Advanced Down Payment Processing with milestone billing, and EBRR dynamic fiscal-period determination
The feed now shows Extend Sales Order with Issue Summary by Using BAdI SD_SLS_END_OF_FINALIZE with pubDate Mon, 29 Jun 2026 01:31:39 GMT
New 30 June 2026 RSS item: Chinese-language SAP Cloud ERP Business AI article on Assistant, Agent, and Skill concepts for process-aware AI coordination.

sources.title: Extend Sales Order with Issue Summary by Using BAdI SD_SLS_END_OF_FINALIZE
sources.checksumMethod: Cleaned visible text after removing scripts, styles, tags, and normalized whitespace
trackedSignals: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition developer extensibility example for Sales Documents
BAdI SD_SLS_END_OF_FINALIZE runs at the end of the sales-order Finalize phase after standard processing
Example use case maintains custom field YY1_ISSUE_SUMMARY_SDH as a human-readable summary of current sales-order issues
Implementation references enhancement spot ES_SD_SLS_DEV_EXTEND and method IF_SD_SLS_END_OF_FINALIZE~MODIFY_FIELDS
Article now calls out simulation-mode skip logic and the generated control flag needed for custom-field writes
